name: Mesoblast Limited
analysis: MSB has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 37% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$2.0850, stop A$1.8958, target A$2.2950 (1.11:1) — then trail it.
